COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KWAN, ELOISA Y AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-30-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-01-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-15-2004

AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-30-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DEPT. 212; COMM. ARLENE BORICK; CLERK RANI EDWARDS; REPORTER LAVON GRANGER; ELIZABETH MACDONALD, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF. PER REQUEST OF COUNSEL MACDONALD, CASE OFF CALENDAR. COURT ORDERED CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2004 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
